subcodes.first_line: O friends of this Prisoner! The two loving companions, His Holiness Taráz and His Holiness 'Alí-Akbar, are bringing fragrance to the senses of the eager ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان این زندانی دو یار مهرپرور حضرت طراز و حضرت علی اکبر مشام مشتاقانرا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
